ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "date_utc" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade in UTC */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the options contract */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the options contract */,
  "right" TEXT /* Type of the options contract (C for call, P for put) */,
  "close_btc" REAL /* Closing price of the options contract in BTC */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* Implied volatility of the options contract */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "underlying_price" REAL /* Price of the underlying cryptocurrency */,
  "contract_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the options contract */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, expired) */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage used in the trade */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Trading strategy used (e.g., long, short, spread) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., manual, API, algorithm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_trades_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_trades_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain technology used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the options contract */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the options contract */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the options contract */,
  "right" TEXT /* Type of the options contract (C for call, P for put) */,
  "contract_size" REAL /* Size of the contract (e.g., 1 BTC, 100 ETH) */,
  "last_traded_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the contract */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_trades" (
  "user_trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the trade */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss price */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take-profit price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES options_trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical trade record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "date_utc" TEXT /* Date and time of the historical record in UTC */,
  "close_btc" REAL /* Closing price of the options contract in BTC */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* Implied volatility of the options contract */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "underlying_price" REAL /* Price of the underlying cryptocurrency */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the trade */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the trade */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the historical trade record (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES options_trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "date_utc" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data in UTC */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the cryptocurrency */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency in the given period */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency in the given period */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume compared to the previous period */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous period */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, risk analysis) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data and content of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for displaying prices (e.g., USD, BTC) */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Notification settings for the user (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the user (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Preferred time zone of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme of the user (e.g., light, dark) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
